description: Recto: document, possibly part of a letter, mentioning different kinds of silk cloth, quantities and prices, and the name Ibn Yosef. Verso: possibly part of Arabic accounts, mentioning quantities and names such as Saʿīd Ibn al-Ḥusayn. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
